title: WritableSecretStore subtrait design: write capability at compile time
description: put() in SecretStore subtrait (not supertrait) is the correct design. A future contributor might suggest 'simplify by putting put() back in SecretStore'. Resist this: it forces every read-only backend (env, bitwarden) to implement a stub returning an error — deferring a type-level contract to a runtime failure. The separate trait makes write capability explicit at the Arc<dyn ...> type level.
